SECTION C COMPRESSION ELBOWS

90 DEG ELBOW Male JIC To Male Pipe

Tube   Part No.   Description
1/4    XX-200-A   Tube 1/4 Pipe 1/4 NPT
1/2    XX-201-A   Tube 1/2 Pipe 3/8 NPT

STRAIGHT UNION

Tube   Part No.   Description
1/4    XX-210-A   Tube 1/4
3/8    XX-211-A   Tube 3/8

Complies with ASME B16.26 for tube to pipe applications.
